summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Track The Breach marketing site. Tested homepage, navigation mega-menus, all 53 category routes, pricing, contact form, all top-level pages (about/careers/partners/blog/trust-center/faq), mobile responsive, FAQ accordion, and blog search/filter. All flows pass with no critical issues.
critical_code_review_comments: Pricing.jsx renders the highlighted plan badge as 'Most popular' (lowercase 'p'). Test request used 'Most Popular' (capital P). Casing is inconsistent with marketing-standard 'Most Popular' but functionality is fine. Cosmetic only.
Navbar mega-menu opens on hover only (no click/focus fallback). Keyboard users / touch users on tablet may not be able to open dropdowns. Consider also opening on focus/click for accessibility.
Some pages exceed 700 lines (e.g., data/content.js likely large) — consider splitting if maintenance grows. Not verified.

success_rate.backend: N/A (no backend tested - static marketing site)

test_credentials: N/A — no auth flows; Sign Up/Log in are external links to app.trackthebreach.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is fully static marketing-only React SPA. data-testid attributes are consistent and reliable. Tested: hero (risk-score-value=73, hero-cta-primary/secondary present), 4 mega-menu dropdowns hover-open and navigate, all 53 CATEGORY_ROUTES load with >400 chars content (no 'Page not found'), Pricing has 5 plans + comparison table, Contact form posts toast 'Thanks — our team will reply within 4 business hours.' and clears via sonner, /about /careers /partners /blog /trust-center /faq all load, mobile menu opens with 24 nav links, FAQ accordion uses Radix (data-state toggles closed->open on trigger click), blog search and category buttons work. External CTAs go to https://app.trackthebreach.com/signup and /login.

test_summary.homepage: PASS — hero, risk score 73, threat feed, footer all present
test_summary.navbar_mega_menu: PASS — Product/Solutions/Resources/Company hover dropdowns open, Email Monitoring link navigates correctly
test_summary.category_routes_53: PASS — all 53 routes load with valid content
test_summary.pricing: PASS — 5 plans (Starter/Professional/Business/Enterprise/Full Secure), 'Most popular' badge, comparison table
test_summary.contact_form: PASS — sonner toast shows on submit and form clears
test_summary.mobile_responsive: PASS — hamburger menu opens with 24 nav links at 375x812
test_summary.blog_filter: PASS — search input filters, category buttons clickable
test_summary.external_cta_links: PASS — Sign Up -> app.trackthebreach.com/signup, Log in -> app.trackthebreach.com/login

rca_of_the_issue: No issues found requiring RCA. Initial test detected 'Most Popular' text-search miss — root cause: badge text is rendered as 'Most popular' (lowercase 'p') in Pricing.jsx; functionally fine, only casing differs from review request. Initial FAQ toggle test detected aria-expanded=None — root cause: test selector matched the AccordionItem div instead of the inner trigger button; re-test against data-state='closed'->'open' on AccordionItem confirms accordion works.
